strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js across multiple roles
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Demonstrated expertise in scalable systems, microservices, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services, despite mentioning it in skills
Recent role change (April 2025) suggests limited tenure in current position
No explicit mention of Vitest or Playwright testing frameworks in recent work
response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack credentials with deep TypeScript and Node.js experience, plus recent work in AI-agent infrastructure—highly relevant to the role. His history of scalable systems (handling millions of requests) and cloud-native development (Kubernetes, AWS) is valuable. However, limited Kotlin/Java backend experience and no explicit Vitest/Playwright testing in recent roles are minor concerns, though his general testing expertise (Jest, Selenium) mitigates this.
